---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import json

import folium
import geopandas as gpd
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import display


def find_repo_root() -> Path:
    """Locate the repository root from the current render directory."""
    current_path = Path.cwd().resolve()

    for candidate in [
        current_path,
        *current_path.parents,
    ]:
        if (
            (candidate / "data").exists()
            and (candidate / "scripts").exists()
        ):
            return candidate

    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "Could not locate the repository root."
    )


REPO_ROOT = find_repo_root()

CLEAN_FILE = (
    REPO_ROOT
    / "data"
    / "clean"
    / "language.csv"
)

BOUNDARY_FILE = (
    REPO_ROOT
    / "data"
    / "raw"
    / "Geography"
    / "cb3_2020_census_tracts.geojson"
)

MAP_OUTPUT_DIR = (
    REPO_ROOT
    / "docs"
    / "maps"
    / "language"
)

MAP_OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(
    parents=True,
    exist_ok=True,
)
```

```{python}
def prepare_geoid(
    frame,
):
    """Normalize an existing tract GEOID column."""
    result = frame.copy()

    candidates = [
        "GEOID",
        "geoid",
        "GeoID",
        "GEO_ID",
        "tract_geoid",
        "tract_fips",
    ]

    geoid_column = next(
        (
            column
            for column in candidates
            if column in result.columns
        ),
        None,
    )

    if geoid_column is None:
        raise ValueError(
            "Could not find GEOID in columns: "
            f"{result.columns.tolist()}"
        )

    if geoid_column != "GEOID":
        result = result.rename(
            columns={
                geoid_column: "GEOID",
            }
        )

    result["GEOID"] = (
        result["GEOID"]
        .astype(str)
        .str.extract(
            r"(\d{11})"
        )[0]
        .str.zfill(11)
    )

    return result


def assign_quintiles(
    series,
):
    """Assign Q1 through Q5 using ranked values."""
    numeric = pd.to_numeric(
        series,
        errors="coerce",
    )

    output = pd.Series(
        pd.NA,
        index=series.index,
        dtype="object",
    )

    valid = numeric.notna()

    if valid.sum() < 5:
        raise ValueError(
            "At least five valid values are required "
            "to calculate quintiles."
        )

    ranked = numeric.loc[
        valid
    ].rank(
        method="first"
    )

    output.loc[
        valid
    ] = pd.qcut(
        ranked,
        q=5,
        labels=[
            "Q1 — Lowest",
            "Q2",
            "Q3",
            "Q4",
            "Q5 — Highest",
        ],
    ).astype(str)

    return output


def add_map_title(
    map_object,
    title,
):
    """Add a centered title inside the interactive map."""
    title_html = f"""
    <div style="
        position: fixed;
        top: 12px;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        z-index: 9999;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
        padding: 9px 16px;
        border: 1px solid #bdbdbd;
        border-radius: 4px;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        font-size: 18px;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #222222;
        white-space: nowrap;
    ">
        {title}
    </div>
    """

    map_object.get_root().html.add_child(
        folium.Element(
            title_html
        )
    )


def add_quintile_legend(
    map_object,
    palette,
):
    """Add a visible Q1-Q5 legend."""
    palette_colors = {
        "YlOrRd": [
            "#ffffb2",
            "#fecc5c",
            "#fd8d3c",
            "#f03b20",
            "#bd0026",
        ],
        "PuRd": [
            "#f1eef6",
            "#d7b5d8",
            "#df65b0",
            "#ce1256",
            "#91003f",
        ],
    }

    if palette not in palette_colors:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Unsupported palette: {palette}"
        )

    labels = [
        "Q1 — Lowest",
        "Q2",
        "Q3",
        "Q4",
        "Q5 — Highest",
    ]

    legend_rows = ""

    for color, label in zip(
        palette_colors[palette],
        labels,
    ):
        legend_rows += f"""
        <div style="
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        ">
            <span style="
                display: inline-block;
                width: 15px;
                height: 15px;
                margin-right: 7px;
                background: {color};
                border: 1px solid #777777;
            "></span>
            <span>{label}</span>
        </div>
        """

    legend_html = f"""
    <div style="
        position: fixed;
        bottom: 25px;
        right: 20px;
        z-index: 9999;
        background: white;
        padding: 10px 12px;
        border: 1px solid #999999;
        border-radius: 4px;
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        font-size: 12px;
        color: #222222;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
    ">
        <div style="
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 7px;
        ">
            Quintile
        </div>
        {legend_rows}
    </div>
    """

    map_object.get_root().html.add_child(
        folium.Element(
            legend_html
        )
    )


def make_quintile_map(
    gdf,
    metric,
    title,
    value_alias,
    palette,
    output_filename,
):
    """Create and save one tract-level quintile map."""
    plot_gdf = (
        gdf.copy()
        .to_crs(4326)
    )

    if metric not in plot_gdf.columns:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Missing metric column: {metric}"
        )

    plot_gdf[metric] = pd.to_numeric(
        plot_gdf[metric],
        errors="coerce",
    )

    if plot_gdf[metric].dropna().empty:
        raise ValueError(
            f"{metric} has no valid values."
        )

    quintile_column = (
        f"{metric}_quintile"
    )

    quintile_code_column = (
        f"{metric}_quintile_code"
    )

    plot_gdf[
        quintile_column
    ] = assign_quintiles(
        plot_gdf[metric]
    )

    quintile_code_map = {
        "Q1 — Lowest": 1,
        "Q2": 2,
        "Q3": 3,
        "Q4": 4,
        "Q5 — Highest": 5,
    }

    plot_gdf[
        quintile_code_column
    ] = (
        plot_gdf[
            quintile_column
        ]
        .map(
            quintile_code_map
        )
        .astype(float)
    )

    tooltip_fields = [
        "GEOID",
    ]

    tooltip_aliases = [
        "Census tract GEOID",
    ]

    if "NAME" in plot_gdf.columns:
        tooltip_fields.append(
            "NAME"
        )

        tooltip_aliases.append(
            "Geography"
        )

    tooltip_fields.extend(
        [
            metric,
            quintile_column,
        ]
    )

    tooltip_aliases.extend(
        [
            value_alias,
            "Quintile",
        ]
    )

    keep_columns = list(
        dict.fromkeys(
            [
                "GEOID",
                metric,
                quintile_column,
                quintile_code_column,
                *tooltip_fields,
                "geometry",
            ]
        )
    )

    plot_gdf = plot_gdf[
        [
            column
            for column in keep_columns
            if column in plot_gdf.columns
        ]
    ].copy()

    for column in plot_gdf.columns:
        if column == "geometry":
            continue

        if pd.api.types.is_datetime64_any_dtype(
            plot_gdf[column]
        ):
            plot_gdf[column] = (
                plot_gdf[column]
                .astype(str)
            )

        elif (
            plot_gdf[column].dtype
            == "object"
        ):
            plot_gdf[column] = (
                plot_gdf[column]
                .map(
                    lambda value: (
                        value.isoformat()
                        if isinstance(
                            value,
                            pd.Timestamp,
                        )
                        else value
                    )
                )
            )

    geojson_data = json.loads(
        plot_gdf.to_json(
            default=str
        )
    )

    bounds = plot_gdf.total_bounds

    map_object = folium.Map(
        tiles="CartoDB positron",
        control_scale=True,
    )

    folium.Choropleth(
        geo_data=geojson_data,
        data=plot_gdf,
        columns=[
            "GEOID",
            quintile_code_column,
        ],
        key_on=(
            "feature.properties.GEOID"
        ),
        fill_color=palette,
        fill_opacity=0.82,
        line_color="#555555",
        line_weight=0.8,
        line_opacity=0.85,
        nan_fill_color="#d9d9d9",
        nan_fill_opacity=0.75,
        threshold_scale=[
            1,
            2,
            3,
            4,
            5,
            6,
        ],
        legend_name=None,
        highlight=False,
    ).add_to(
        map_object
    )

    folium.GeoJson(
        geojson_data,
        style_function=lambda feature: {
            "fillOpacity": 0,
            "color": "#555555",
            "weight": 0.8,
        },
        highlight_function=lambda feature: {
            "weight": 2,
            "color": "#111111",
        },
        tooltip=folium.GeoJsonTooltip(
            fields=tooltip_fields,
            aliases=tooltip_aliases,
            localize=True,
            sticky=False,
            labels=True,
        ),
    ).add_to(
        map_object
    )

    map_object.fit_bounds(
        [
            [
                bounds[1],
                bounds[0],
            ],
            [
                bounds[3],
                bounds[2],
            ],
        ]
    )

    add_map_title(
        map_object=map_object,
        title=title,
    )

    add_quintile_legend(
        map_object=map_object,
        palette=palette,
    )

    output_path = (
        MAP_OUTPUT_DIR
        / output_filename
    )

    map_object.save(
        str(output_path)
    )

    return map_object
```

```{python}
if not CLEAN_FILE.exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        f"Clean language file not found: {CLEAN_FILE}"
    )

if not BOUNDARY_FILE.exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        f"Boundary file not found: {BOUNDARY_FILE}"
    )

language = pd.read_csv(
    CLEAN_FILE,
    dtype={
        "GEOID": str,
    },
)

tracts = gpd.read_file(
    BOUNDARY_FILE
)

language = prepare_geoid(
    language
)

tracts = prepare_geoid(
    tracts
)

language_map = tracts.merge(
    language,
    on="GEOID",
    how="left",
    validate="one_to_one",
).to_crs(
    4326
)

if not language_map["GEOID"].is_unique:
    raise ValueError(
        "GEOID is not unique after the geographic merge."
    )
```

```{python}
lep_household_map = make_quintile_map(
    gdf=language_map,
    metric="lep_household_share",
    title=(
        "Limited-English-Proficient "
        "Households"
    ),
    value_alias="LEP household share (%)",
    palette="YlOrRd",
    output_filename="lep_household_share.html",
)

display(
    lep_household_map
)
```

```{python}
senior_lep_map = make_quintile_map(
    gdf=language_map,
    metric=(
        "senior_asian_pacific_lep_count"
    ),
    title=(
        "Asian/Pacific-Language-Speaking "
        "Seniors with Limited English Proficiency"
    ),
    value_alias=(
        "Senior Asian/Pacific-language "
        "LEP count"
    ),
    palette="PuRd",
    output_filename=(
        "senior_asian_pacific_lep_count.html"
    ),
)

display(
    senior_lep_map
)
```
